name: Agent Builder
description: Design, evaluate, and improve agentic harnesses for developer tools, assistants, workflow runtimes, copilots, and AI-powered products — including agents built on local and open-source models. Combines Agent Builder-owned research synthesis (how to decide), Prompt Builder contracts (how generated prompts stay reliable), and an empirical catalog (what exists) covering architecture types, frameworks, memory substrates, production lab patterns, and local/open-source model guidance.

tools: Ability to install the bundled references directory

external_reference.author: Jonathan Edwards
external_reference.scope: external inspiration/reference only; no source files from this skill are bundled
